description_long: This picnic table features a rectangular wooden tabletop composed of several parallel planks, supported by a robust cross-braced base. The table is finished in a rich brown color, giving it a classic and natural appearance suitable for outdoor environments. The support structure consists of two X-shaped legs at either end, providing stability and a distinctive visual style. The tabletop is wide and flat, offering ample space for dining or gathering. There are no attached benches, indicating that seating is separate from the table itself. The overall design is sturdy and functional, with clean lines and a smooth surface.
description: A brown wooden picnic table with a plank-style tabletop and X-shaped cross-braced legs, designed for outdoor use and without attached benches.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the X-shaped cross-braced support and the parallel planks of the tabletop.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full rectangular tabletop and the angled legs, with no benches visible.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, mirroring view 0, again showing the X-shaped support and plank arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, displaying the tabletop and angled legs from the other side.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by two X-shaped cross-braced legs at either end, providing stability and a distinctive look.
